notes: category mismatch justified: this case's failure_category in case.json/ground_truth.json is `test_assertion` because case.schema.json's enum doesn't yet include `matrix_or_monorepo_failure` — that v2 category is only in case_tags.schema.json. Setting tags.failure_category=matrix_or_monorepo_failure surfaces the true v2-flavored shape. The matrix structure IS the salient feature: ALL 7 Windows configs (x64/Win32/arm64 × default/free-threading × switch-case/tail-call) fail uniformly while ALL Linux/macOS variants pass, because the bundled-on-Windows-only tcltk update broke Unicode surrogate handling. Linux/macOS use system tcl/tk and aren't affected. multi_failure=true (2 distinct test_tcl tests fail with the same root cause). First v2 case using `matrix_summary` evidence_format (the `1 test failed: test_tcl` runner summary block) and first v2 case in matrix_or_monorepo_failure category.
